name: Petticoat Tails (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven to 350°F/Gas 4.
2. Grease a baking sheet.
3. Cream the butter and icing sugar together in a bowl.
4. Sift in the flours and work into a smooth dough; if the dough is too dry, a little water can be added to moisten.
5. Divide into two.
6. Roll out on a floured surface and shape into two thin rounds.
7. Place on the sheet and prick all over with a fork.
8. Mark each round into 6 triangles.
9. Bake for about 20-25 minutes until pale golden in colour.
10. Sprinkle with caster sugar while still warm.
11. Cut into the triangles and cool on a wire rack.
